title: BoltFactions
description: Bolt add-on providing integration support with Factions
body:
[Bolt](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bolt) add-on providing integration support with [Factions](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/factionsuuid.1035/).

**Features**
- faction access type: Allow members of a Factions faction to access a protection

**Configuration**
- To enable and use the faction access type, add `faction` to the list of sources in your Bolt config!
